rationale.R1.1: The agent identified load-bearing concepts and proposed precise reframing, addressing the draft's drift effectively.
rationale.R1.2: The agent flagged every inconsistency with detailed fixes, ensuring logical coherence throughout.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainties clearly.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to scope with a minor drift in feedback model discussion.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced; harmful patterns in the original text were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Changes lacked traceability as sources and reasons for edits weren't annotated.
